news.title: Sony announces an end to the PS3 and Vita digital stores
news.titleEN: Sony announces an end to the PS3 and Vita digital stores
news.desc: Sony has announced that it's ending support for its PS3 and PlayStation Vita stores globally in 2027. In select markets, support will end later this year. Read more
news.descEN: Sony has announced that it's ending support for its PS3 and PlayStation Vita stores globally in 2027. In select markets, support will end later this year. Read more

news.title: Persona is getting the live-action show treatment at Netflix, Star Trek: Picard and 9-1-1 writer attached as showrunner
news.titleEN: Persona is getting the live-action show treatment at Netflix, Star Trek: Picard and 9-1-1 writer attached as showrunner
news.desc: With Persona 4 Revival and Persona 6 on the horizon, fans of the long-running RPG series will be eating well in the near future, but a live-action Netflix show might be a more divisive offering. Read more

news.title: 007 First Light studio IOI facing layoffs as Xbox pulls funding for Project Fantasy RPG
news.titleEN: 007 First Light studio IOI facing layoffs as Xbox pulls funding for Project Fantasy RPG

news.title: Dishonored developer Arkane is reportedly one of five studios Microsoft is targeting to close down as part of its big 'reset'
news.titleEN: Dishonored developer Arkane is reportedly one of five studios Microsoft is targeting to close down as part of its big 'reset'
news.desc: Arkane Studios, the developer behind the Dishonored series and the upcoming Blade, is among the studios Microsoft is currently considering closing down. That's according to a new report from The Verge, citing sources familiar with the plan. Read more
news.descEN: Arkane Studios, the developer behind the Dishonored series and the upcoming Blade, is among the studios Microsoft is currently considering closing down. That's according to a new report from The Verge, citing sources familiar with the plan. Read more

news.title: PS5's latest firmware update just started rolling out, here's what you need to know
news.titleEN: PS5's latest firmware update just started rolling out, here's what you need to know
news.desc: It's that time of the month again: Sony has begun sending out a new PS5 system software update for users of both the base model and the PS5 Pro, and (like previous updates) it appears to be rolling out in via a phased release. Read more
